sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check positions
for n in current_frame.segmentation['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ['N', 'b', 'R', 'r']:
        b = n['boundary']
        r = (min(p[0] for p in b), max(p[0] for p in b))
        c = (min(p[1] for p in b), max(p[1] for p in b))
        print(f"{n['color']}: px={n['pixels']}, rows={r}, cols={c}")

# Click blue target to swap blue block and blue dots
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 36, 'col': 48}])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
